sections.title: Projects
sections.body: A collection of active and experimental systems exploring automation, data structures, and interactive design.

items.title: Idle Battle
description: A system designed around automated combat and progression with minimal player input.
Focuses on passive gameplay loops, scaling systems, and stat-driven outcomes.
about: An idle-based combat system focused on automation and progression.

items.title: EVG
description: A sandbox-style board system combining structured world spaces with flexible gameplay systems.
Designed to support evolving mechanics, entities, and layered game interactions.
about: A modular sandbox system with layered world and gameplay structures.
